description_long: This is a classic banker’s lamp featuring a rounded, green-tinted glass shade supported by a polished brass or bronze metal frame and base. The lamp has a sturdy, ornate base with decorative ridges and a central column that supports the horizontal arm. A single exposed bulb is visible beneath the glass shade, and a pull-chain switch hangs from the socket for manual operation. The glass shade is slightly curved and translucent, diffusing the light softly. The metal components have a glossy, reflective finish, adding to the lamp’s vintage aesthetic. This style of lamp is commonly found on desks in libraries, offices, or study areas.
description: A vintage banker’s lamp with a green glass shade, ornate brass base, and pull-chain switch, designed for desks or tables.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full glass shade, bulb, and pull-chain switch centered above the ornate base.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the curved arm, the underside of the glass shade, and the bulb’s position.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the glass shade, the horizontal support bar, and the detailed base.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the arm’s curve, the bulb, and the pull-chain from a different perspective.
